footer.description: Premium outdoor furniture manufacturer and supplier — crafting durable, weather-resistant pieces for hospitality, residential, and commercial outdoor spaces.

seo.title: DHT Outdoor Furniture — Premium Manufacturer & Supplier
seo.description: DHT Outdoor Furniture Production — premium outdoor & indoor furniture manufacturer. Teak, solid wood, custom orders. ISO certified. 25+ export countries.

intro.label: Who We Are
intro.paragraph1: DHT Outdoor Furniture Production is a premium outdoor furniture manufacturer with a 5,000m² production facility in Jakarta. Over 15 years of partnership with hotel brands, resorts, and designers across 25+ countries.
intro.paragraph2: Every product — from teak dining sets to weather-resistant sofas — is crafted by 400+ skilled artisans, undergoing multi-stage quality control.

featured.label: Selected Pieces
featured.heading: Featured Products
featured.description: Handpicked from our latest collections — each piece crafted with precision and designed to elevate any space.
featured.noProducts: No featured products in this category yet.

whyUs.label: Why DHT
whyUs.heading: Your Trusted Manufacturing Partner
whyUs.description: From concept sketch to container delivery — we manage every step with precision, transparency, and care.
points: In-house production: no outsourcing, full quality control
Custom sizes, finishes, and OEM / ODM available
Stable capacity for large hospitality & development projects
Experienced export team, on-time delivery record

materials.label: Materials
materials.description: We source only premium-grade natural materials — each selected for its structural integrity, aesthetic warmth, and lasting beauty. FSC-certified timber, sustainably harvested.

solidOak.name: Solid Oak
solidOak.desc: Straight grain, warm honey tones, exceptional durability

walnutWood.name: Walnut Wood
walnutWood.desc: Deep chocolate hues, fine texture, mid-century warmth

premiumTeak.name: Premium Teak
premiumTeak.desc: Natural oils, all-weather resilience, golden brown beauty

linenVelvet.name: Linen & Velvet
linenVelvet.desc: Curated upholstery fabrics in timeless palettes

rooms.label: Inspiration
rooms.heading: Room by Room
rooms.description: Every space tells a story. Discover furniture curated for each room in your home.

quotes.quote: DHT delivered all 200 units on time with exceptional finish quality. Professional and responsive throughout.
quotes.name: James Lim

quotes.quote: We've partnered with DHT for three hospitality projects. Consistent quality and hassle-free logistics.
quotes.name: Sophie Tan

quotes.quote: The custom bedroom sets exceeded expectations. True craftsmanship at a competitive price.

cta.heading: Ready to Furnish Your Space?
cta.description: Contact our team for custom quotes, bulk orders, and project consultations. We ship worldwide.

seo.title: About Us — DHT Outdoor Furniture
seo.description: Learn about DHT Outdoor Furniture — 15+ years of furniture manufacturing excellence.

hero.title: About DHT
hero.subtitle: Premium outdoor furniture manufacturer. Crafting durable, weather-resistant pieces since 2008.

story.label: Our Story
story.heading: From Workshop to World-Class Factory
story.paragraph1: DHT Outdoor Furniture Production started in 2008 as a small workshop in Jakarta with just 12 craftspeople and a passion for quality.
story.paragraph2: Today, we operate a 5,000m² modern production facility with 400+ skilled artisans, exporting to 25+ countries. Our ISO 9001:2015 certification reflects our commitment to consistent quality.
story.paragraph3: We specialize in teak, solid wood, and weather-resistant materials — crafting furniture for hotels, resorts, restaurants, and luxury residences worldwide.

qualityFirst.title: Quality First
qualityFirst.desc: ISO 9001:2015 certified. Multi-stage quality control on every piece.

craftspeople.title: 400+ Craftspeople
craftspeople.desc: Skilled artisans with generations of furniture-making expertise.

globalExport.title: Global Export
globalExport.desc: Reliable shipping to 25+ countries with full documentation.

customOem.title: Custom OEM/ODM
customOem.desc: Custom designs, finishes, and branding for your projects.

items.title: Founded

items.title: ISO Certified

items.desc: First container shipments to Singapore, Australia, and Europe.
